name: Minature Chocolate Eclairs
recipeIngredient: 1 Package chocolate pudding mix, Cook & Serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pudding according to package instructions. Cool for 1 hour.
2. In a saucepan, heat butter, water, and salt over medium heat until the mixture boils and butter melts. Reduce heat to low. Vigorously stir in flour all at once until the mixture forms a ball. Transfer pastry dough to a bowl. Stir in eggs one at a time, beating well after each.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease a baking sheet. Drop the dough into 12 mounds, about 5 inches apart. Spread each mound into a 4x1/2-inch rectangle, piling dough on top and slightly rounding the sides. Bake until golden, 35 minutes. Remove from oven; make a 1-inch slit on the side of each eclair.
4. Reduce oven temperature to 375°F and bake for an additional 10 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.
5. Heat butter and chocolate over low heat, stirring until melted. Remove from heat, stir in sugar, milk, and vanilla until smooth. Slice eclairs in half. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of filling onto each bottom half and replace the tops. Spread the tops with frosting.
